title: Sanji and Usopp Make Their Stand
description: Enel’s larger plan emerges as the Ark Maxim becomes central to his dream of leaving Skypiea behind.
scene: Across pages 10, 11, 12, 13, this scene centers on Enel, Luffy, Nami, Zoro, Nico Robin. Enel’s larger plan emerges as the Ark Maxim becomes central to his dream of leaving Skypiea behind.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: emerges from a dial inside the hilt...

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: And follows the target wherever they go!!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: You are all into gadgets around here...

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Are getting a little too crowded....!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: We are here to help, ohm-sama!!!

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: We are the only ones left!!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: I know! I'll dig a hole!

summary: Enel’s larger plan emerges as the Ark Maxim becomes central to his dream of leaving Skypiea behind.
